name: James Blood Ulmer
description: '''Willie James''' "'''Blood'''" '''Ulmer''' (February 8, 1940 – June 3, 2026) was an American [[jazz]], [[free funk]] and [[blues music|blues]] guitarist and singer. He played a [[Gibson Byrdland]] guitar. His guitar sound has been described{{By whom|date=June 2026}} as "jagged" and "stinging". An article by journalists [[Peter Margasak]] and Graham Flashner called Ulmer's singing "raggedly soulful".
